# Revenge of the Fallen Rotmg Wiki
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Revenge%20of%20the%20Fallen%20Rotmg%20Wiki&prop=wikitext

<mainpage-leftcolumn-start />

==Welcome to the Wiki==

Revenge of the Fallen(RotF) is a RotMG private server that includes many custom bosses, mechanics, and items.

Play here at 

https://rotf.io/webclient.html

==Links==
'''Items:'''

<u>Weapons:</u>
* Daggers: [https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/wiki/Daggers]
* Bows:[https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/wiki/Bows]
* Staves:[https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/wiki/Staves]
* Swords:[https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/wiki/Swords]

* Wands:[https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/wiki/Wands]
* Katanas:[https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/wiki/Katanas]
<u>Abilities:</u>
* Cloaks:[https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/wiki/Cloaks]
* Quivers:[https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/wiki/Quivers]
* Spells:[https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/wiki/Spells]
* Tomes:[https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/wiki/Tomes]
* Helms:[https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/wiki/Helms]
* Shields:[https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/wiki/Shields]
* Seals:
* Poisons:
* Skulls:
* Traps:
* Orbs:
* Prisms:
* Scepter::
* Stars:

<u>Armors:</u>
* Robes:
* Light Armors:
* Heavy Armors:

<u>Rings:</u>

'''Classes:'''

'''Dungeons:'''

'''Runes:'''[https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/wiki/Runes]
* <u>Rune Builds:</u>
Latest Activity

<activityfeed></activityfeed>

[[File:Placeholder|298px]]

[[Category:Browse]]
